title: Task view component for displaying agent tool call details and nested timeline
purpose: Displays the details of an agent tool call including description, subagent type, prompt excerpt, and a nested timeline of related entries.

steps.content: Extract input properties from the tool call item.
Retrieve nested turn IDs and timeline data from the agent store.
Filter and memoize nested timeline entries based on turn IDs.
Create a prompt excerpt with character limit if the prompt is too long.
Render the description and subagent type if they exist.
Display the prompt excerpt in a preformatted code block if it exists.
Show a loading spinner if there are no nested entries.
Render nested timeline entries as a list with different styling based on entry type.
Check if there are any nested turn IDs.
IF no nested turn IDs exist, return an empty array.
Create a set of nested turn IDs for efficient lookup.
Filter timeline entries to include only those matching the nested turn IDs.
